title: Johnny's SMP Modpack
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8Dupk1Cg/images/5de73f4f884b5c9edf193836de6db8d2233abf60.png)

<center>
  A based survival multiplayer modpack.
</center>

---

Johnny's SMP Modpack incorporates a variety of mods, including performance enhancers, visual improvements, and gameplay tweaks. This modpack allows players to easily join survival multiplayer servers with minimal setup.

---

## Mods List

### Notable Mods
1. Sodium 
2. Iris Shaders
3. Distant Horizons
4. Xareo's World Map
5. Simple Voice Chat

### QOL Mods
1. Mouse Tweaks
2. Controlling
3. Bridging Mod
4. Lighty

### Performance Mods
1. Sodium
2. Lithium
3. More Culling
4. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
